scripts.lint: oxlint web/src web/scripts server/src scripts tests
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix web/src web/scripts server/src scripts tests
scripts.fmt: oxfmt web/src web/scripts web/vite.config.ts server/src scripts tests package.json web/package.json server/package.json tsconfig.base.json web/tsconfig.json web/tsconfig.node.json server/tsconfig.json
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check web/src web/scripts web/vite.config.ts server/src scripts tests package.json web/package.json server/package.json tsconfig.base.json web/tsconfig.json web/tsconfig.node.json server/tsconfig.json
